summary: Complete testing of three dashboard improvements: (1) Quick Screen search bar at top with placeholder and Screen button, (2) Last updated timestamp with refresh button next to dashboard title, (3) Live Activity Feed with 15 diverse entries showing varied action types with different icons and colors. All features working correctly. Backend returns 15 diverse feed entries. Frontend displays all action types with correct icons and color accents.

issues: Console warning: recharts ResponsiveContainer shows width/height warning during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/activity-feed returns 200 with 15 diverse entries
Backend: Feed entries include varied action types: screening_run, case_resolved, customer_created, case_created, sar_filed, case_status_changed, case_assigned, user_login
Backend: Feed entries have richer labels based on result: 'KYC Verified' for clear, 'Match Found' for match, 'High Risk Alert' for potential_match
Backend: Feed entries include customer names: Rahul Sharma, Priya Patel, Ahmed Khan, Vikram Mehta, Anjali Gupta, Deepak Reddy, etc.
Frontend: Quick Screen bar renders at top of dashboard with data-testid='quick-screen-bar'
Frontend: Quick Screen input has placeholder 'Enter name or ID to screen instantly...'
Frontend: Quick Screen button shows 'Screen' text with search icon
Frontend: Quick Screen navigates to /screening?q={query} on click
Frontend: Last updated timestamp shows next to dashboard title (e.g., 'Last updated: just now')
Frontend: Refresh button exists with data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn' and is clickable
Frontend: Live Activity Feed shows 15 feed items with data-testid='feed-item-{idx}'
Frontend: Feed shows KYC Verified entries with green CheckCircle icon (rgb(16, 185, 129))
Frontend: Feed shows Pep Match Found entries with red AlertTriangle icon (rgb(239, 68, 68))
Frontend: Feed shows High Risk Alert entries with red AlertTriangle icon (rgb(239, 68, 68))
Frontend: Feed shows Case Resolved entries with green CheckCircle icon (rgb(16, 185, 129))
Frontend: Feed shows Customer Onboarded entries with teal UserPlus icon (rgb(20, 184, 166))
Frontend: Feed shows SAR Filed entries with red Flag icon (rgb(239, 68, 68))
Frontend: Feed shows Case Status Changed entries with orange AlertTriangle icon (rgb(245, 158, 11))
Frontend: Feed shows Case Assigned entries with orange AlertTriangle icon (rgb(245, 158, 11))
Frontend: Feed shows New Case Opened entries with orange AlertTriangle icon (rgb(245, 158, 11))
Frontend: Feed shows Logged In entries with gray LogIn icon (rgb(100, 116, 139))
Frontend: Feed entries show relative timestamps (just now, X min ago)
Frontend: Dashboard stat cards still show correct values with sparklines
Frontend: Donut chart still renders correctly with Low/Medium/High segments
Frontend: India heat map still renders with city dots
Frontend: Integration Status cards show Signzy, OpenSanctions, News API in Demo Mode
seed_data_creation: 15 recent activity entries seeded on startup via seed_recent_activity() with diverse action types and customer names. Entries are seconds-based (10s to 960s ago) so they always appear as most recent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard improvements fully tested. Three new features: (1) Quick Screen bar at top with search input and Screen button - navigates to /screening?q={query}, (2) Last updated timestamp with Refresh button next to 'Compliance Dashboard' title, (3) Live Activity Feed with 15 diverse entries showing varied action types (KYC Verified, Pep Match Found, High Risk Alert, Case Resolved, Customer Onboarded, SAR Filed, Case Status Changed, Case Assigned, New Case Opened, Logged In) with different icons and color accents per action type. Backend seed_recent_activity() creates 15 entries with specific customer names and action types. ActivityFeed.js getIconForItem() function maps action labels to icons/colors.

quick_screen_bar.placeholder: Enter name or ID to screen instantly...
